returns.allValid: Whether all addresses have valid proofs
returns.invalidAddresses: Array of addresses that failed verification

returns.hasRiskProof: Whether any risk proof is valid
returns.maxAllowedTier: Maximum tier this address qualifies for

params._zkNAF: Address of the AMTTPzkNAF verifier contract

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.tier: Tier to apply (0 to remove override)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addressTierOverride(address).notice: Custom tier overrides for specific addresses

batchVerify(address[],uint8).notice: Batch verify multiple addresses (for multi-sig, etc.)

getComplianceStatus(address).notice: Get the compliance status summary for an address

setExemption(address,bool).notice: Set exemption status for an address

setTierOverride(address,uint256).notice: Set tier override for specific address

transferTiers(uint256).notice: Transfer tiers (0 = lowest, higher = more stringent)

verificationExempt(address).notice: Addresses exempt from zkNAF verification (e.g., contracts, bridges)

verifyTransfer(address,address,uint256).notice: Verify a transfer is allowed based on zkNAF proofs

zkNAF().notice: Reference to the zkNAF verifier contract

zkVerificationEnabled().notice: Whether zkNAF verification is required for transfers
